scenarios.name: employee_directory_join
scenarios.description: Employee-directory join across employee, department, and job over the main staff range.
scenarios.plan:
Select Expression
    -> First N Records
        -> Nested Loop Join (inner)
            -> Filter
                -> Table "EMPLOYEE" as "E" Access By ID
                    -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY7" Range Scan (lower bound: 1/1, upper bound: 1/1)
            -> Filter
                -> Table "DEPARTMENT" as "D" Access By ID
                    -> Bitmap
                        -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY5" Unique Scan
            -> Filter
                -> Table "JOB" as "J" Access By ID
                    -> Bitmap
                        -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY2" Unique Scan

scenarios.name: project_staff_rollup
scenarios.description: Project staffing rollup across employee_project, project, and employee.
scenarios.plan:
Select Expression
    -> First N Records
        -> Sort (record length: 60, key length: 24)
            -> Aggregate
                -> Nested Loop Join (inner)
                    -> Filter
                        -> Table "EMPLOYEE_PROJECT" as "EP" Access By ID
                            -> Index "RDB$FOREIGN16" Full Scan
                                -> Bitmap
                                    -> Index "RDB$FOREIGN15" Range Scan (lower bound: 1/1, upper bound: 1/1)
                    -> Filter
                        -> Table "PROJECT" as "P" Access By ID
                            -> Bitmap
                                -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY12" Unique Scan
                    -> Filter
                        -> Table "EMPLOYEE" as "E" Access By ID
                            -> Bitmap
                                -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY7" Unique Scan
